text: The dim lighting and neon hues give an uncanny, futuristic vibe to the space. I feel like I've stepped into a place where boundaries blur between the real and the possible—a laboratory for new ideas. There is a sense of anticipation, but also a subtle isolation; the emptiness of the chairs and the cold glow evoke curiosity as well as a little unease. Being here stirs questions about purpose and progress, and whether I am here as an observer, a participant, or perhaps, part of an experiment myself.
